case_title: PEDRO M JAVIER JR VS. BLAIR ANTHONY KECK

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAVIER JR, PEDRO M AS TO DEFENDANT KECK, BLAIR ANTHONY D.D.S., AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
